seoTitle: East Feluga vs East Greenmount — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Feluga and East Greenmount. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Feluga vs East Greenmount: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Feluga and East Greenmount.
heading: East Feluga vs East Greenmount — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Feluga, Queensland and East Greenmount, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Feluga has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to East Greenmount (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Feluga or East Greenmount safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Feluga has a flood risk score of 46/100, while East Greenmount scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Feluga scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. East Greenmount scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Feluga or East Greenmount?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Feluga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
